I Want to Look Chic Without Trying Too Hard—8 Summer Dress Trends I'm Relying On

1. Shirred Bodices

Shirred bodices and square necklines are an easy way to make summer dresses feel romantic but still wearable.

2. Drop-Waist Dresses

Drop-waist dresses keep showing up with volume through the skirt and a cleaner, more directional shape.

3. Romantic Sleeves

Romantic sleeves, fairy sleeves, and flutter sleeves soften the whole silhouette without trying too hard.

4. Elegant Bandeaus

Elegant bandeau dresses are being styled with floral prints and easy sandals instead of feeling too polished.

5. Boudoir-Inspired Dressing

Boudoir-inspired dressing leans on lace slips and sheer layers for a dressed-up summer evening mood.
